title: Crispy Italian Cauliflower Roast
description: A sour, crispy cauliflower roast infused with lemon zest, herbs, and Parmesan, perfect for a lazy Sunday dinner thats both keto-friendly and Italian-inspired.
instructions: Preheat oven to 425 °F (220 °C) and line a baking sheet with parchment paper or a silicone mat.
In a large bowl, toss cauliflower florets with olive oil, lemon zest, oregano, basil, red pepper flakes, salt, and pepper until evenly coated.
Spread the florets in a single layer on the prepared baking sheet, ensuring they are not crowded.
Roast in the preheated oven for 20–22 minutes, flipping halfway, until edges are golden and florets are tender.
Remove from oven and sprinkle grated Parmesan and lemon juice over the hot cauliflower, tossing gently to coat.
Return to oven for an additional 3–4 minutes to melt the cheese and crisp the tops.
Let rest for 2 minutes, then transfer to a serving dish.
Garnish with a few fresh basil leaves or a drizzle of olive oil, if desired, and serve immediately.
